reviews.review_description:
Very fun and addicting gameplay with smooth frames 


































































go to their discord to redeem for free until 11/22/22 ;)

I find it really fun to train my reaction time and aim with this game. There's a few different modes that I find pretty fun to play and while there's still room for more additions, this game is already very fun.
I got this game for free and it’s amazing

The game is great for what it is, and that is all you can ask of a game! It’s simple, yet it’s pretty fun. The leaderboard things that pop up when a round ends are a little laggy, as when I shot the arrows the board didn’t change. But overall this was great, I’d give it a 4.5 out of 5.

When I got it I noticed it was under developed but that is what to expect from an app on applab and after I played for about 10 minutes messing around or genuinely playing the gamemodes, my aim on Gun Raiders improved A LOT so I recommend. Looking forward to further updates which make it better!
guns feel very smooth and accurate, little to no lag, and there were like no bugs at all. i got this game for free but it is definitely worth the money

This game is amazing! There’s different modes, guns, and settings; so it has something for everyone! It’s also smooth and lag free, plus, I don’t believe there’s any bugs! Definitely worth getting, 11/10!
